mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id, created_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{createdTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id, created_time) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{roleId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
